text: The cool air, sharp angles, and vivid modern design make me feel alert and a bit curious. The R+D wall hints at a celebration of research and development, evoking a sense of innovation and promise. I feel like I am in a space dedicated to the pursuit of knowledge, where new ideas are welcome and boundaries are meant to be explored. It is stimulating, yet a little impersonal—a perfect environment for contemplating how humans and intelligent machines can coexist.
